description: Red and grey textured rucksack with stitched detail and overlays, branding on the front, has stitched tabs, a loop, a tab with a drawstring closure and embroidered details, has a flap with an elasticated mouth and tabs, secured with dual buckle closures, a zip pocket on the flapA haul loop on the top, two padded and adjustable shoulder straps with mesh inner, branding on one strap and an adjustable tab on either strapAn adjustable waist strap, secured with a click claspOne main compartment, secured with a drawstring closure, has a tab across the mouth secured with a buckle closure, has a mesh zip pouchA mesh stash pocket on either side with an elasticated mouthMultiple compression straps with buckle closures on the sidesPadded mesh backWarranty: 5-year warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
